title: Senior Doctor - GE Healthcare India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - GE Healthcare India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? GE Healthcare India in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About GE Healthcare India:
GE Healthcare India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
